name: Minmetals Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Minmetals Development Co., Ltd. operates as a steel distribution service provider in China and internationally. It offers iron ore, coal, coke, pig iron, steel billets, scrap steel, waste ships, refractory materials, barite, fluorspar, talc, silicon carbide, and metallurgical industry raw materials; and ferrochrome, silicomanganese, ferromanganese, electrolytic manganese, ferrosilicon, molybdenum iron, molybdenum oxide, nickel iron, tungsten iron, ferrovanadium, ferrotitanium, boron iron, iron alloys, and alloy raw materials, such as chrome ore and manganese ore. The company also provides rebars, high wires, coiled screws, hot rolled coils, strips, plates, cold rolled coils, galvanized sheets, color coated sheets and various industrial materials, steel and stainless steel, special steel, steel pipes, cast pipe castings, auto parts, hardware and electrical equipment, complete sets of equipment, etc. It addition, it is involved in the provision of logistics, transportation, freight forwarding, ship generation, warehousing, and processing and distribution, as well as insurance and supply chain finance services; tendering business; industrial investment business; and operation of an e-commerce platform to sell its products. Further, the company engages in the short, medium, and long-term time charter operations and escrow business, as well as offers shipping for dry bulk and groceries, containers shipping services, and engineering logistics projects; and consulting services, such as transportation design, market forecasting, and analysis. The company is based in Beijing, China.
